name: Yankee Greens and Yogurt Soup
recipeIngredient: Or Spinach, Kale, Mustard Or Combination
recipeInstructions:
1. Place olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
2. Add onions and cook until softened, about 10 minutes.
3. Gradually add greens (a handful at a time), stirring until limp and slightly cooked, about 5 minutes.
4. Stir in dill, then add 1 1/2 cups water and bring to a simmer.
5. Turn off the heat and let cool slightly.
6. In a large bowl, stir smooth yogurt.
7. While continuing to stir, slowly add the liquid from the pan.
8. Return the yogurt mixture to the pan and stir well.
9. Cook over low heat just until warm. Do not boil or it will curdle.
10. Add salt and pepper to taste.
11. Ladle into warm bowls, sprinkle with sunflower seeds, and serve at once.
